title: Lime Crunchy Zest
description: This low-calorie-friendly Mediterranean dish combines fermented lime with a crunchy texture for an energizing snack that's perfect as a mid-morning or evening treat.

ingredients.name: Fermented Lime zest
ingredients.notes: Preferably made from fermented limes to enhance its flavor and texture.

instructions: Combine lime juice, fermented lime zest, olive oil, minced garlic, and red pepper flakes (if using) in a mixing bowl.
Season with salt to your preference.
Fold in chopped fresh parsley until well combined.
Serve immediately or store any leftovers in an airtight container for up to 3 days.
